hero_cta.heading: Show up ready.
hero_cta.copy: Street Miles begins with presence, then gets validated by discipline and execution.

marquee.text: AREN ATHLETIC — NEW YORK CITY — DISCIPLINE AND PERFORMANCE — STREET MILES NYC — FIVE BOROUGH CHAPTER — STRUCTURED PERFORMANCE — AREN ATHLETIC COLLECTIVE — APPAREL BUILT FOR TRAINING —

culture.heading: Street Miles is the street-level expression of AREN's standards.
culture.copy:
Street Miles is the street-level expression of AREN's standards. This is a disciplined run culture built on shared accountability and urban grit.

It provides a structured ecosystem for athletes committed to showing up for the work, regardless of environment or condition.

This is not a casual run club; it is where standards become visible on the pavement and discipline is forged through repetition.

protocol.heading: The operating standard for every session.
protocol.copy: Every Street Miles session follows a clear protocol so the group moves with consistency, awareness, and purpose.

cards.title: 01 / SESSIONS — Structure
cards.description: Every Sunday at 09:00 sharp. We execute rotating sessions across the five boroughs—focused on bridges, blocks, and industrial sectors.

cards.title: 02 / RUN TYPES — Intent
cards.description: Threshold runs, capacity work, bridge repeats, and pace-based efforts. Each session has intent, not randomness.

cards.title: 03 / VIGILANCE — Composure
cards.description: Composure, awareness, and shared accountability define how the chapter moves. The city is part of the test.

chapter.heading: The Five Borough Chapter
chapter.copy:
The Street Miles ecosystem is engineered for modular expansion. NYC provides the street-level proof of concept, establishing the standard of discipline and collective accountability.

As AREN grows, new chapters will launch in urban hubs where standard execution and high performance are mandatory, ensuring consistent run culture nationwide.

quotes.heading: Voices from the run culture.
quotes.copy: The standard is best described by the people carrying it week after week.

cards.title: ATHLETE 089 / SMNYC CHAPTER
cards.description: Street Miles is where discipline becomes visible. You feel the standard in who shows up, how they move, and how they carry the work.

cards.title: CHAPTER LEAD / NYC
cards.description: This is not a casual run club. It is structured, demanding, and honest. That is exactly why it matters.

cards.title: OPERATOR / FIVE BOROUGHS
cards.description: The city becomes part of the training environment. Every session sharpens presence, vigilance, and collective accountability.

access.heading: Enter the chapter the right way.
access.copy: Connect, arrive on time, and move with the group standard from the first session forward.
